issues.title: Enemy dealt 22 dmg (88% of 25 HP) on floor 3 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 3 (seq 208), the enemy dealt 22 damage which is 88% of the player's 25 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 15 dmg (83% of 18 HP) on floor 3 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 4 (seq 212), the enemy dealt 15 damage which is 83% of the player's 18 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 22 dmg (100% of 22 HP) on floor 3 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 5 (seq 216), the enemy dealt 22 damage which is 100% of the player's 22 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 by knowledge_golem (boss)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 against knowledge_golem (boss). Accuracy was 80% over 5 turns. They dealt 52 damage and took 96 damage. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing boss HP/damage on floor 3, or providing a healing opportunity before bosses.

issues.title: HP declined 5 consecutive encounters (81 -> 0) with no recovery
issues.description: Player HP decreased over 5 consecutive encounters with no recovery: F2E1:81HP -> F2E2:63HP -> F3E0:61HP -> F3E1:47HP -> F3E2:0HP. This attrition pattern suggests the player had no way to recover.
issues.suggestedFix: Add HP recovery between encounters or increase heal card effectiveness.

issues.title: Player defeated despite 76% accuracy — knowledge mastery didn't save them
issues.description: Player was defeated with 76% overall accuracy (112/148 correct), well above 60%. Dying despite knowing the material feels unfair and undermines the core loop.
reproductionSteps: Review enemy damage scaling vs. healing/shield availability
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce enemy damage or increase healing for players above 60% accuracy (canary system integration).

issues.title: F2E2 (stone_sentinel) took 18 turns vs prev floor avg 2.7
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 2 against stone_sentinel (mini_boss) took 18 turns. Previous floor averaged 2.7 turns. This is a 6.8x spike, exceeding the 2x threshold.
issues.suggestedFix: Review stone_sentinel HP/defense scaling relative to floor 1 enemies.
